info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/user/me \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/auth/user/me", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/signin \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"email":"user@example.com","password":"stringst","turnstileToken":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"email\":\"user@example.com\",\"password\":\"stringst\",\"turnstileToken\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/signin", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/signout \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/signout", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

201.description: Sign up and sing in successfully

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/signup \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"email":"user@example.com","password":"stringst","turnstileToken":"string","defaultSpaceName":"string","refMeta":{"query":"string","referer":"string"},"verification":{"code":"string","token":"string"},"inviteCode":"string"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"email\":\"user@example.com\",\"password\":\"stringst\",\"turnstileToken\":\"string\",\"defaultSpaceName\":\"string\",\"refMeta\":{\"query\":\"string\",\"referer\":\"string\"},\"verification\":{\"code\":\"string\",\"token\":\"string\"},\"inviteCode\":\"string\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/signup", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

conn.request("PATCH", "/api/auth/change-password", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()

get.description: Get user information via access token

count.description: The number of invite codes to generate

times.description: The number of invite codes to use

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/auth/waitlist-invite-code \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"count":10,"times":10}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"count\":10,\"times\":10}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/auth/waitlist-invite-code", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))
